mapper.select: SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM NAS_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = PARENT_FOLDER_ID AND USER_CODE = #{userCode}

WITH RECURSIVE FOLDER_TREE AS ( SELECT FOLDER_ID, PARENT_FOLDER_ID FROM NAS_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #{folderId} AND USER_CODE = #{userCode} UNION ALL SELECT F.FOLDER_ID, F.PARENT_FOLDER_ID FROM NAS_FOLDER F JOIN FOLDER_TREE FT ON F.PARENT_FOLDER_ID = FT.FOLDER_ID WHERE USER_CODE = #{userCode} ) SELECT FOLDER_ID, PARENT_FOLDER_ID FROM FOLDER_TREE
mapper.update: UPDATE NAS_FILE_PREVIEW SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' , DELETED_AT = NOW() WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND FILE_ID = #{fileId}
